meaning: adj.像政治家的,与政治家身份相称的
examples: Early campaign posters featured etched portraits of the candidates looking statesmanly and were printed using wood or metal plates, sometimes inked in color.
That means he would become acting head of state whenever his father, King Norodom Sihanouk, is on medical leave abroad, providing him with a chance to fill a statesmanly role.
